name: Guillotine Cutter
description: Guillotine Cutter is the archbishop of a new religion he created in which believes that he is god. He is one of the three vampire hunters with Episode and Dramaturgy, who  ~!stole both of Kiss-shot's arms.!~   ~!After he was defeated by Araragi, he attempts to slay a full-powered Kiss-Shot but is killed and consumed.!~
